name: Wand of Choking Mist (2nd-Rank)
description:
This blackened wood wand has a smoldering tip, emitting a slight trail of steam.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast , but the mist prevents creatures from being able to breathe in its area. They must hold their breath or start suffocating.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of .
